summary: Full-stack testing of CinemaForge: 27/27 backend pytest tests pass; all 9 frontend flows pass (Home, Auth/Register, Browse nav, Leaderboard 3 columns, Create→Forge→Movie Detail, Play placeholder, Like, Rate, Fork, Archive button visible to creator, AI FORGE chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 reply, Settings tabs, File Decoder text+hex preview).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~500 lines and mixes models/auth/routes/seed/AI — split into modules (auth.py, movies.py, ai.py, seed.py) as it grows.
ai/chat route currently allows anonymous calls (uid='anon'); consider rate limiting or requiring auth to avoid abuse of EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
POST /api/movies/{id}/watch increments unconditionally with no per-user dedupe — counts can be inflated by repeat presses.
fork_movie uses MovieCreateIn but does not preserve original title verbatim (it appends ' (Evolution)') — fine, just document.
MovieDetail.jsx fetches initial liked/rating state from server is missing — `liked`/`rating` state always starts false/0 even if user already liked/rated, leading to UX desync.
Frontend Bootstrap calls POST /api/seed on every mount — already idempotent server-side, but generates noisy traffic; gate behind a one-time localStorage flag.
Sticky Forge Setup panel can be visually hidden behind sidebar on smaller widths; verify breakpoints (>1080 is OK).
test_credentials: Tests register fresh users dynamically (email pattern test_<uuid>@cinemaforge.io / Pass1234!). EmailStr rejects .test TLD — must use a real-looking TLD.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 trending prompts, 8 actors, and ~24 movies via POST /api/seed (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints documented in test_cinemaforge.py covering: seed (idempotent), auth (register/login/me), prompts (12), actors (8), movies list with filters (genre/sort/q/coming_soon/fork_of/creator_id), leaderboard (3 buckets), movie detail (click increments), CRUD-style interactions (create requires auth, like toggles, watch increments, rate 1-5 with validation, fork creates with fork_of, archive creator-only). AI /api/ai/chat verified with live Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. UI testids confirmed: auth-page, auth-username/email/password/submit/toggle, home-page, row-*, sidebar-*, header-create-btn, ai-chat-toggle, ai-chat-dock/input/send/close, prompts-grid, prompt-pN, actor-aN, length-/format-/pick-genre-, forge-submit, movie-actions, play-btn, like-btn, rate-N, fork-btn, share-btn, archive-btn, player-close, file-viewer-page, file-input, text-preview, hex-preview. File Decoder route is /decoder (not /files).
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Initial pytest failures were test-side: Pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLD (.test); fixed by using cinemaforge.io domain. Default movies sort returned recently-created user movies so the 'archive someone else's movie' test had to filter creator_id=system-curator.
